notes: Search results should show Consumer Support Help first for final-expense-support searches.
Replace REPLACE_WITH_FINAL_EXPENSE_DID before enabling live call routing.
If DID is not active, route the CTA to a lead form instead.
consumerSupportHelp.requiredOn: All live/indexable final expense pages and all protected final expense pages before batch unlock.
consumerSupportHelp.implementationStatus: CSH listing present on every detected final expense page; DID placeholder must be replaced before live call routing.
consumerSupportHelp.ssdiImplementationStatus: CSH listing present on live SSDI guide and protected local SSDI pages; DID placeholder must be replaced before live call routing.
